headline: Heat Dome 🍳🔥 Scorchin’ 4th of July BBQ 🍖🇺🇸
text: Scorch City 🏙️🔥 just got served a HEAT DOME 🍳☀️ straight from Hell’s Kitchen 😈🔥 – temps stuck at 100F (38C) for DAYS 📆 like a never-ending Taylor Swift setlist 🎤🔥! Millions East Coast peeps 😰💦 sweatin’ like they’re in a Travis Kelce two-a-day 🏈💨 while the humidity turns sidewalks into slip-n-slides 🛝💧! Heat index hittin’ 115F in DC 🏛️😵, Philly 🔔🥵 & NYC 🗽🔥 – that’s hotter than Swiftie wedding tea ☕💍 at MSG on Friday 🍕🎤! Mayor Mamdani 🗣️🧊 straight-up told New Yorkers ‘STAY INSIDE & STAY COOL’ ❄️🏠 or risk meltin’ like an ice cream cone at a World Cup tailgate ⚽🍦! NWS dropping truth bombs 💣🌡️: ‘Rare long-duration heat with ZERO overnight relief’ – basically the planet’s AC is BROKEN 🔧💨! Central Park hit 100F 🌳🌡️ (feels like 106F) – hottest in 15 YEARS 📅😱! Trump 🍊👑 still slinging speeches outside on the 4th 🗣️🔥, flexin’ ‘107 degrees? I’ll talk LONGER just cuz’ – presidential roast mode activated 🍖👑! World Cup matches outdoors ⚽🌡️ lookin’ like a sweat-fest sauna 🧖‍♂️🔥, while Canada 🇨🇦🍁 roasts up to 99F in Ontario & Quebec 🥵🏒! High pressure ‘heat dome’ 🍳☁️ sittin’ on the Midwest-to-Northeast like a bad sequel nobody asked for 📽️😩 – dry soil makin’ the sun straight-up cook the concrete 🧱🔥! Climate change cranked the dial 🌡️🌍 – world already +1.1C since the industrial era started 🏭📈, and temps keep climbin’ like Swift album sales 📀🚀 unless we cut emissions FAST 🛑💨! Thunderstorms might crash the party 🌩️💦 on the 4th, droppin’ temps a smidge but still roastin’ above average – Sunday/Monday bring cooler Canadian air 🍁❄️! So slather on that SPF 1000 🧴😎, chug water like it’s Taylor’s Eras Tour hydration station 💧🎤, and pray your AC doesn’t tap out before the fireworks do 🎆🔥!
